common.password_min_length: New password must be at least 8 characters.

exam_list.confirm_delete_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this exam?
exam_list.take_disabled_submitted: You have already submitted this exam.
exam_list.start_early_hint: Early start: auto-submit after {{minutes}} minutes (scheduled duration).
exam_list.start_auto_hint: Start time reached — the system opens the session automatically; no button click needed.

exam_result.no_questions: No questions in this exam session.
exam_result.subtitle: Review answers and scores for your session
exam_result.essay_partial_grade: Teacher scored {{earned}}/{{max}} — no fixed model answer
exam_result.legend_full: Green — full credit for the question
exam_result.legend_partial: Yellow — partial essay score (below max, not counted as wrong)
exam_result.total_score_after_essay: Total score will update after the teacher grades essays.
exam_result.essay_no_correct_yet: Waiting for teacher grading — no public model answer

proctoring.force_submit_one_confirm: Force submit for student "{{name}}"? Only applies to their active session.
proctoring.force_submit_all_confirm: Force submit for ALL students currently taking this exam?

exam_take.waiting_teacher_desc: The teacher has not started the exam yet. Please wait in the exam room.
exam_take.waiting_before_schedule_desc: Schedule {{start}} – {{end}}. The exam opens automatically at start time. {{countdown}} remaining.
exam_take.waiting_scheduled_desc: You may enter during the scheduled window. Waiting for the session to open; ends at {{end}}.
exam_take.msg_exam_started: The exam has started. Good luck!
exam_take.msg_final_15: 15 minutes left. Please review and submit.
exam_take.boot_loading_desc: Initializing the exam room and syncing data.
exam_take.boot_error_load: Could not load exam data or start the session.
exam_take.loading_exam_desc: Assigning version codes and arranging questions…
exam_take.exam_started_fullscreen_desc: Click below to enable fullscreen and show the exam. (Browser requires your action.)
exam_take.submit_success_desc: Multiple-choice was auto-graded — you can view correct answers below.
exam_take.submit_essay_pending: {{count}} essay question(s) pending teacher grading — no score yet.
exam_take.submit_failed_desc: Could not send your answers to the server. Please contact the proctor.

question_bank.title: Question bank
question_bank.subject: Subject
question_bank.confirm_delete: Remove this question from the bank?
question_bank.error_import_failed: Could not import questions into exam.
question_bank.error_select_subject: Please select a subject before import.

exam_authoring.no_admin_class: No managed class assigned. Contact an administrator.
exam_authoring.duration_desc: Only used when no schedule (start + end) is set.
exam_authoring.opens_at_desc: Session auto-opens at this time if teacher has not started early.
exam_authoring.error_schedule_order: Start time must be before end time.
exam_authoring.error_schedule_incomplete: Enter both start and end time.
exam_authoring.num_versions_desc: Choose 1–4; each version imports a separate Word (.docx) file.
exam_authoring.multi_version_hint: Each version = one Word file. Students are distributed across versions; questions and options are shuffled per version.
exam_authoring.error_need_version_questions: Version {{version}} has no questions — import Word for that version.
exam_authoring.error_need_version_questions_hint: (Current: {{summary}}. Select the version tab → Preview & import → confirm in the dialog.)
exam_authoring.file_selected_not_imported: File selected for {{code}} but not imported — click Preview & import and confirm.
exam_authoring.empty_version_desc: Select tab {{code}} → upload Word → Preview & import → confirm.
exam_authoring.word_import_tags_label: Authoring format requires CHƯƠNG (chapter). Each question may start with
exam_authoring.word_import_tags_example: CAU 1 [LOAI:TN] [DIEM:0.5] [KHO:DE] [CHUONG:1] — declare CHUONG 1 at file start; optional .zip for media; remove template instructions before real use
exam_authoring.empty_create_desc: Import from Word to start building the exam.
exam_authoring.empty_edit_desc: Import Word to add questions to this exam.
exam_authoring.media_upload_desc: JPG, PNG, MP3, MP4… — CLOUDINARY_URL required on server
exam_authoring.error_load_failed: Could not load exam authoring data.
exam_authoring.error_fill_required: Enter title, class, and valid duration.
exam_authoring.error_save_failed: Could not save exam. Check data and try again.
exam_authoring.error_read_file: Could not read Word or media ZIP. Check template .docx and .zip.
exam_authoring.question_bank_hint: Pick questions from the subject bank for version {{code}} (can combine with Word import).
exam_authoring.question_bank_empty: No questions in this subject bank.
exam_authoring.question_bank_all_added: All listed questions are already in this version.
